issues.message: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold component.
issues.suggestion: Raw <div> used instead of a Marigold layout component. Search the Marigold docs for layout alternatives.

issues.message: Inline style on <div> bypasses the design system (display, justifyContent, alignItems, minHeight, padding).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Inline style on bypasses the design system (width, height, borderRadius, objectFit, flexShrink).
issues.suggestion: Use Marigold layout components (Stack, Columns, Inset, Container) and theme tokens instead of inline styles.

issues.message: Inline style "padding: 20px" on <div> (“Jane DoeActiveRoleSenior DeveloperDepart”) uses a hardcoded value instead of a design token.
issues.suggestion: Use var(--token-name) or a Marigold component prop instead of hardcoding "20px".

issues.message: Inline style "border-radius: 8px" on uses a hardcoded value instead of a design token.
issues.suggestion: Use var(--token-name) or a Marigold component prop instead of hardcoding "8px".

issues.message: Flex container children are wrapping to 2 rows (2 children, container 1208px wide, content 1312px wide).
issues.suggestion: Consider using <Columns collapseAt="..."> for responsive multi-column layout, or <Stack> for vertical arrangement.

issues.message: Document should have one main landmark (landmark-one-main)
issues.suggestion: Wrap your page content in `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` to provide a `<main>` landmark. Import AppLayout from `@marigold/components`.

issues.message: All page content should be contained by landmarks — 3 elements affected (region)
issues.suggestion: All page content must be inside a landmark region. Use `<AppLayout>` with `<AppLayout.Main>` for the main area, `<TopNavigation>` for the header (`<header>`), and `<Sidebar>` for side navigation (`<aside>`). Import from `@marigold/components`.

sourceCode:
import { useState } from 'react'; import { Stack, Inline, Button, Badge, Headline, Text, Inset } from '@marigold/components'; const TestApp = () => { const [messageAction, setMessageAction] = useState(false); const [editAction, setEditAction] = useState(false); return (
{/* Header with Avatar and Status */} Jane Doe Active {/* Details Section */}
Role Senior Developer
Department Engineering
Email jane.doe@example.com
Location Freiburg, Germany
{/* Bio Section */} Jane is a talented senior developer with 8+ years of experience building scalable applications. She specializes in frontend architecture and loves mentoring junior team members. {/* Action Buttons */} {/* Action Feedback */} {messageAction && ( Message action triggered! )} {editAction && ( Edit profile action triggered! )}
); }; export default TestApp;

passed.description: Includes a profile image (img tag or image URL)
Uses layout primitives (Stack, Columns, or Inline)
No onClick on Marigold Button components
